Event: The Lost Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 01/06/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: SC23


Other locations the gear can be found
Donkey
Red Dragon
Master of Crystallization Scepter

Once in a while, the unit heats up the weapons of 3 random enemies for 9 sec. During this time, every 3 sec, the enemies take 160000 magic damage and trigger one of the following effects:
The enemy has a 50% chance to be set on fire. The burning enemy takes 128000 magic damage and has their healing rate reduced by 35% for 3 sec.
The enemy has a 50% chance to be disarmed for 3 sec. During this time, the enemy can't user the weapon abilities.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
